channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/4/20)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的信息流里，关于 AI 编程和智能体（Agent）的干货特别多。我发现大家不仅在用 AI 写代码，还在研究怎么让 AI 自己操作浏览器、管理记忆，甚至构建更复杂的多智能体系统。如果你对 AI 开发、编程助手和 Agent 技术感兴趣，今天有几个项目和讨论绝对不能错过。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的信息流里，关于 AI 编程和智能体（Agent）的干货特别多。我发现大家不仅在用 AI 写代码，还在研究怎么让 AI 自己操作浏览器、管理记忆，甚至构建更复杂的多智能体系统。如果你对 AI 开发、编程助手和 Agent 技术感兴趣，今天有几个项目和讨论绝对不能错过。

item.title: browser-use/browser-harness
item.description: Self-healing browser harness that enables LLMs to complete any task. | 近期热门 | 总 2406 stars
item.author: browser-use

item.title: kyegomez/OpenMythos
item.description: A theoretical reconstruction of the Claude Mythos architecture, built from first principles using the available research literature. | 近期热门 | 总 1694 stars
item.author: kyegomez

item.title: Manavarya09/design-extract
item.description: Extract any website's complete design system with one command. DTCG tokens, semantic+primitive+composite, MCP server for Claude Code/Cursor/Windsurf, multi-platform emitters (iOS SwiftUI, Android Compose, Flutter, WordPress), Tailwind v4, Figma variables, shadcn/ui, CSS health audit, WCAG remediation, Chrome extension. MIT, Playwright, Node 20+. | 近期热门 | 总 1093 stars
item.author: Manavarya09

item.title: WeaveMindAI/weft
item.description: A programming language for AI systems | 近期热门 | 总 882 stars
item.author: WeaveMindAI

item.title: xataio/xata
item.description: Open source, cloud native, Postgres platform with copy-on-write branching and scale-to-zero | 近期热门 | 总 639 stars
item.author: xataio

item.title: bergside/design-md-chrome
item.description: Chrome extension to extract styles from any website and generate DESIGN.md files and design skills for AI based on TypeUI | 近期热门 | 总 479 stars
item.author: bergside

item.title: millionco/claude-doctor
item.description: Diagnose your Claude Code sessions | 近期热门 | 总 472 stars
item.author: millionco

item.title: Quorinex/Freebuff2API
item.description: 🚀 OpenAI-compatible Freebuff proxy with dynamic free-agent tracking, token rotation, and ready-to-use Docker deployment. | 近期热门 | 总 339 stars
item.author: Quorinex
